message:
fix(doctor,schema): collect all integrity_check rows and skip redundant WAL pragma

Refactor check_integrity to use conn.query() and collect all diagnostic
rows from PRAGMA integrity_check instead of only reading the first via
query_row(), surfacing multi-row corruption reports with structured JSON
metadata. Gracefully handle query errors without panicking. Add helper
integrity_check_messages() with unit test.

In apply_runtime_pragmas, only set journal_mode=WAL when the database is
not already in WAL mode, preventing steady-state opens from turning a
read path into a write-like operation that contends with other readers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
